summary: Re-tested XplanSyncHub Sync Log tab fix from iter 209. The tokens .slice TypeError is RESOLVED. Sync Log tab now renders fully without ErrorBoundary. All required testids present, Xmerge token catalogue renders 35 tokens from backend object map, Push/Pull compliance buttons fire correct toasts and append to audit log. All 6 hub tabs (Core, Xtools+, WealthSolver, IPS, Reporting, Sync Log) load without JS errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix at /app/frontend/src/pages/XplanSyncHub.jsx lines 373-400 is correct: IIFE normalizes raw tokens via Array.isArray check then Object.entries fallback — defensive coding handles either backend shape.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 209 critical bug (TypeError: tokens.slice is not a function on /xplan-sync-hub Sync Log tab) is fully fixed. Validated: (1) Sync Log tab loads with hub-push-compliance, hub-pull-compliance, hub-sync-log testids visible, 29 hub-event-* rows (>25 required), no JS errors / no ErrorBoundary. (2) Xmerge token catalogue card renders 35 tokens — each shows token name + placeholder (e.g. 'client.fullname' / '[entity_name]'). (3) Push compliance click → toast 'Compliance pushed (mock) - 9 files · 22.2% compliant' + audit log grew 29→30. (4) Pull compliance click → toast 'Pulled 2 GRC flags (mock)' + audit log grew 30→31. (5) Smoke test all 5 other tabs (hub-tab-core, hub-tab-xtools, hub-tab-wealthsolver, hub-tab-ips, hub-tab-reporting) — all load without ErrorBoundary or console errors. NOTE for next agent: correct tab testid for Core CRM is 'hub-tab-core' (not 'hub-tab-coreCRM').

test_results.xmerge_token_catalogue_renders: PASS (35 tokens, object map → name+placeholder pairs)
